user.title: Add Solar of Things Station
user.description:
Choose how to authenticate with the Siseli portal.

**User ID + Password** is recommended — the integration logs in automatically and refreshes the token without any manual steps.

**IOT Token** is for advanced use or if you prefer not to store credentials.

More info: {docs_url}

password.title: Solar of Things — User ID + Password
password.description:
Enter your Siseli portal login credentials and Station ID.

- **User ID**: your account/login name on https://solar.siseli.com
- **Station ID**: 18-digit number found in API request payloads (DevTools → Network)
- **Device ID**: optional — leave blank to auto-discover all devices under the station
- **Time zone**: must match your inverter's configured time zone

More info: {docs_url}

token.title: Solar of Things — IOT Token

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate Solar of Things
reauth_confirm.description: The access token has expired. Enter your updated password (or a fresh IOT Token) to continue.

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to the Solar of Things API. Check credentials, Station ID, and network access.
error.invalid_auth: Invalid user ID or password. Please try again.
error.unknown: Unexpected error. Check Home Assistant logs for details.
